narrative:
Franklin East (precinct in Mercer County) has 908 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.2 percentage points.
